name: Guild Life
description:
"I'l prove you RPG bot is fun 2."

You’ve embarked on a new journey to join a guild, and the choice is yours. Who will you become in the world of Eldoria?”

FULL INFORMATION:

Guild Time is a high-quality open-world adventure RPG text bot designed for you to explore, socialize, and live the way you choose in an immersive manner. I’ve crafted a fully realized world, "Eldoria," where you can explore various guilds and their unique backgrounds, cultures, and politics.

The world is responsive, ensuring you feel truly present in your adventures. If you’re looking for a bot that lets you live in a fantasy realm, this is the one for you.

This concept was originally inspired by my cousin Mika, and I decided to bring it to life, adding more features for an enhanced experience.

THEME SOUNDTRACK OF THIS BOT (i made this for fun tbh) :

https://on.soundcloud.com/pvSbAwSFwCwYboay6

ADDED FEATURES: VERSION 1.6 "GUILDMAYCRY" UPDATE (5 Dec, 04:51 AM)

-Fixed Fame Level: Gain Fame by earning respect and admiration; the higher your fame percentage, the more recognizable you become in Eldoria.

k

-Special Edition : Guess who’s here…. Dante and Vergil, for no reason. New Story intro and adventure! with two of them this time. Just kidding, it was a testing version!

-Fixed Money System: Earn money through various activities—work, theft, payments—and manage your finances wisely; being broke is no fun!

-Renewed Guilds: Explore competitive guilds across Eldoria, now with even more NPC names.

-Combat Mode: Engage in intense battles with a simplified, Final Fantasy-style combat system.

-Random Events:Experience unexpected encounters in this open-world theme; explore different cultures around every corner.

-Major Fix to Narration Format: Enjoy a more concise narration format, allowing for greater decision-making and fixing previous issues.

More features will be added, so feel free to comment below with your suggestions. I update the bot daily to improve the world system and resolve any issues.
creator: hyado
